heading: Subrogation of the United States
label: 7385a Subrogation of the United States
text: Upon payment of compensation under this subchapter, the United States is subrogated for the amount of the payment to a right or claim that the individual to whom the payment was made may have against any person on account of injuries referred to in .section 7385 of this title
notes: Amendments2004— substituted “this subchapter” for “part B”.Pub. L. 108–375
amendments: Amendments2004— substituted “this subchapter” for “part B”.Pub. L. 108–375
